Cynthia McGuinn, Esq. for and with the Petitioner: Brian F. McDonald, as guardian ad litem for and with and with Megan Muller and Aidan Muller, minor Claimants.
Parties were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petitions were taken under submission, counsel to submit a declaration regarding the subject of the investment in the petition and with approval by the guardian is required.

Attorney's fees: granted at 25%
Reimbursement of litigation costs and expenses total per request in the petition.
Net balance amount to be determined after an additional filing of supplemental pleading to the court.

08-17-12
Order approving Minors' Compromises was submitted, granted and signed by Judge Chaitin.
